strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js and React, exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, founded testing workshops, built Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in the primary stack, nor Vitest specifically (testing experience appears framework-agnostic)
Kotlin is not listed in skills or employment history; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience centers on MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from stated stack

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year full-stack bar with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and re:cinq, and uniquely matches the AI agent requirement through current MCP code generator and agentic framework work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is exceptional (built two D-lang testing tools, ran TDD workshops). Gaps exist in named stack items: Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL are not explicitly cited, though the breadth of languages and frameworks suggests fast ramp-up. AWS and Docker/Kubernetes are evidenced via Optilyz (AWS CDK) and GISCollective (k8s deployment).
